global_description: Small bird with a compact body, vibrant vermilion red plumage on the head and underparts, contrasting with dark brown to black wings and tail. The texture is smooth with a glossy sheen on the red areas.

part_details.head: Bright vermilion red, smooth texture
part_details.wings: Dark brown to black, elongated and narrow
part_details.tail: Dark brown to black, slightly forked

spatial_relations: The vermilion red head transitions into dark wings
The tail extends from the rear of the body
The beak is positioned at the front of the head
